dimension_scores.rationale: PulseGuard is crisply framed: end-to-end credit-risk governance stack on Home Credit, not a toy model. SR 26-2 alignment documented. Project identity locked. -1: one-liner occasionally slips into vague 'platform' language.

Home Credit: 307,511 applicants, 57.4M rows across 7 side-tables, 8.07% DR, real bureau/instalment/credit-card/POS data. SHA256 provenance verified. -2: no temporal split possible (no timestamps); single Eastern-European portfolio only.

140 features from 7 tables: ratio engineering (FOIR proxy, DTI, LTV), bureau aggregates (overdue count/ratio/amount), instalment payment ratios, credit-card/POS DPD ratios, BEHAVIORAL_RISK_SCORE composite, FLAG_EMPLOYED_ANOMALY sentinel. -1: no WOE/IV scorecard; missingness encoding documented but not systematically analysed.

10/10 leakage audit PASS (Gold Pass 1). TARGET not in features. Platt fit on val only. Test never seen until single final evaluation. No post-outcome proxies detected. Group leakage 0 ID overlap. safe_to_tune=true.

12-model G9A baseline + 5-model Optuna tuning tournament. TabNet and sklearn GBM hard-failed with documented cause. LR, RF, SVM, GBM, XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, monotonic variants all attempted. -1: no DeLong test p-values between champion and runner-up. -1: no neural baseline that actually runs.

Optuna TPE, validation-only. Test set never touched during HPO. LightGBM early-stopping bug identified and fixed (not hidden). Trial counts honestly documented (4–8 vs 100-trial plan). Composite 9-component champion score — not AUC alone. -1: trial count genuinely low due to CPU sandbox constraint.

Platt sigmoid selected; isotonic exclusion justified (ECE=0 on val = overfitting artifact). Final test ECE=0.0034 — near-perfect. Brier=0.0668. Calibration artefact in train PSI documented and explained. Calibration fit on val only — no data leakage.

3-zone score-band policy (GREEN/AMBER/RED) with PD-semantic rationale. Cost-sensitive decisioning with 3 scenarios documented. KS-optimal and cost-optimal thresholds both computed and compared. -1: economics are scenario-assumed, not real bank parameters. -1: no Bayes-optimal formula derivation for Home Credit context.

LightGBM pred_contrib SHAP. 20 global features. 4 local cases (GREEN/AMBER/RED/CONFLICT). ECOA-style adverse-action drafts. Monotone constraints provide directional audit without SHAP. All ASSISTIVE_ONLY tagged. -1: reason codes not mapped to a real ECOA-standard approved code list.

30-bootstrap stability check. Top-5 features appear in top-5 in all 30 resamples. EXT_SOURCE_MEAN rank-1 in 30/30. Stability tier documented. Governance conclusion: reason-code set robust to sampling variation.

Proxy audit on age/income/employment/region. Approval-rate differentials aligned with DR differentials — documented honestly. No overclaim: explicitly labelled SKELETON, not certification. Forbidden claims for fairness certification documented. -2: no protected-class labels → DI ratio not computable; proxy analysis cannot substitute for real fairness audit.

val-vs-test PSI=0.0002 STABLE. All top-10 feature PSIs <0.001. Train PSI artefact explained. ECE and AUC consistent across splits. Monitoring recommendation documented (PSI thresholds for production). -2: no true temporal/vintage validation — only random-split PSI; no monthly monitoring harness implemented.

6-case BM25+LLM demo. Abstain fires on OOD. LLM never approves/rejects in any case. ASSISTIVE_ONLY + HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED + NOT_FINAL_DECISION enforced. Conflict/override and drift-alert cases included. -1: 5-doc policy corpus is thin; real deployment needs 50+ policy documents.

Evidence ledger maps every claim to artifact. SOURCE_REFERENCE section separates inherited from PulseGuard-built metrics. Trial count limitations documented honestly. All limitations appear in model card, governance report, and claim boundary. No synthetic number presented as real bank result.

Claim boundary document has safe/forbidden split for every gate. G9A_CLAIM_SAFE_EXAMPLES covers resume, interview, portfolio scenarios. Comprehensive defense document produced. 30+ Q&As with honest, caveated, artifact-traceable answers. -1: no rehearsed spoken-word artifact (audio/video).

top_strengths: Leakage discipline: 10/10 pre-tuning leakage audit; test set evaluated exactly once
Calibration quality: ECE=0.0034 on 61k test set — near-production-quality probability estimates
Reason-code stability: EXT_SOURCE_MEAN rank-1 in 30/30 bootstraps; top-5 stable 30/30
Evidence honesty: every claim traceable to artifact; SOURCE_REFERENCE vs PulseGuard-built clearly separated
Tuning discipline: validation-only HPO; early-stopping bug documented and fixed; composite champion score
Governance completeness: model card + governance report + 7 evidence JSONs + control docs + claim boundary all present
RAG/LLM governance: LLM never approves/rejects; abstain fires on OOD; 6 cases cover full decisioning spectrum
top_remaining_risks: Trial count (4–8 Optuna trials): local optimum, not globally exhaustive — must be stated in every interview
No temporal validation: random split only — in-distribution stability only, not true out-of-time robustness
Fairness skeleton: no protected-class labels → DI ratio uncomputable → cannot claim fairness compliance
Scenario economics: cost matrix (C_bad=10, C_reject=1) not sourced from real bank data
Single geography: Home Credit Eastern European portfolio — no cross-market generalisation claim
SHAP on 500–1000 samples: global importance is a sample estimate, not full-corpus
locked_safe_claims: Tuned LightGBM_monotonic + Platt champion: AUC=0.7769, PR-AUC=0.2628, KS=0.4141, ECE=0.0034 on 61k held-out test
Validation-only Optuna HPO; champion selected by 9-component composite score, not AUC alone
Monotone constraints on 15 features support SR 26-2 directional interpretability
EXT_SOURCE_MEAN dominant SHAP driver (mean |SHAP|=0.510); top-5 features stable in 30/30 bootstraps
RAG/LLM governance assistant: ASSISTIVE_ONLY; abstains on OOD; LLM never makes credit decisions
Fairness proxy audit shows approval-rate differentials aligned with observed DR differentials — no amplification beyond base rates
val-vs-test PSI=0.0002; all top-10 feature PSIs STABLE between train and test
locked_forbidden_claims: Production lending system or live deployment
SR 26-2 certified or regulatory compliance certified
Fairness certified or disparate impact compliant
Real bank data or real lender economics
LLM makes or influences credit decisions
CatBoost is the final champion (champion is LightGBM_monotonic)
AUC=0.7716 is the tuned result (that is the BASELINE untuned CatBoost)
future_builds_not_needed_now: Taiwan Default as primary dataset — Home Credit is materially stronger primary spine
LendingClub reintroduction — dropped; reject inference is a future workstream
Real-time FastAPI scoring API — out of scope for portfolio freeze
Streamlit UI — nice-to-have; not a blocker for resume/interview defense
LLM autonomous credit decisioning — explicitly prohibited by governance design
audit_conclusion: PulseGuard scores 89.3% (134/150) across 15 governance dimensions. Threshold for GOLD is 85%. Status: GOLD. Project is ready for resume and interview defense with documented limitations.
